summary: Nintendo has set Switch 2 US price at $499.99, up $50, and expects to sell 16.5 million units by FY2027, down from 19.86 million previously. The update, reported by CNBC, signals a softer sales outlook as the company moves into its next console cycle.

title: Amazon's Chile data center moves ahead after residents lose environmental challenge
summary: Residents near Santiago, Chile, are concerned about a new Amazon data center. They fear its impact on a cherished local hill and potential power line construction. Despite their opposition, authorities have permitted the data center to proceed. Amazon states its facility will be resource-efficient.
